raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2587 clarifies that both a perpetrator of a sexual assault and an entity that covered up or willfully ignored the assault are held accountable for the harm inflicted on survivors.",
    "AB 2587 provides a two-year window for filing any sexual assault claim, regardless of when the assault occurred.",
    "The #MeToo movement has empowered many survivors to share their stories and stop further violence by their attackers.",
    "AB 2587 aims to send a signal to employers who ignore, promote, or cover up an attack, potentially making daily life safer across all sectors of employment and society.",
    "AB 2587 affirms the rights of survivors to tell their stories on their own terms, free from arbitrary deadlines set by others.",
    "AB 2587 aligns California law with current scientific findings regarding the impact and long-term effects of trauma."
  ]
}
```
